title: How a godly man kills the habit that's running him
caption:
Scripture doesn't say 'work on your sin.' It says put it to death.

Most men are managing the thing that's running them — moderating the scroll, stepping back from the app for a week, cutting down. The problem is: you can't moderate your way to freedom. Romans 8:13 has one instruction. Put it to death.

That means naming it out loud to one man. Cutting the supply line, not just the craving. Replacing it with something real so there's actually something alive where the habit used to be.

It doesn't take a conference or a program. It takes the Spirit and one honest step.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #sin #thework #romans8 #christianity
